subject: [SO] Add logs to STDOUT
commit_message:
[SO] Add logs to STDOUT

This commit add STDOUT appender to root level logging.

Issue-ID: OOM-2514
Change-Id: Ifa7a55a4ee8db4d6c808ef518571f09ef91cf793
Signed-off-by: Dominik Mizyn <d.mizyn@samsung.com>

Patch Set 1:

Those files are never used. You need to:

move the logback file to every subchart
add a new configmap
mount the config map in the desired location
